## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real candidate data added
